description: Smallest AI provides AI voice products, including Lightning text-to-speech, Pulse speech-to-text, the Hydra speech-to-speech model, and Atoms, a platform for building and operating AI voice agents that make and receive phone calls.
summary: Smallest AI exposes documented REST APIs under https://api.smallest.ai/ — the unified Waves speech endpoints (/waves/v1/tts for the Lightning TTS models, /waves/v1/stt/ for the Pulse STT models) and the Atoms voice-agent platform API — authenticated with a Bearer API key, plus an official npm-distributed stdio MCP server (@developer-smallestai/smallest-mcp-server) that authenticates with the same API key, and official agent skills for coding agents (TTS, STT, speech-to-speech, voice agents) at github.com/smallest-inc/skills; it does not expose a public remote MCP endpoint or GraphQL API.
